icp_fit.rationale: Mid-size dental practice (12 employees) in a service industry with clear B2B service needs. Strong ICP match for operational improvement services.

pain_likelihood.rationale: Website shows manual booking via phone-only contact, no online scheduling. Staff page suggests growing team without matching operational infrastructure.

reachability.rationale: One verified email for office manager, phone number available. No direct line to practice owner identified.

personalization_surface_area.rationale: Website has services page, team bios, and patient testimonials. Enough context for personalized outreach referencing specific services and team growth.

commercial_potential.rationale: 12-person practice with multiple locations suggests budget capacity. Service complexity (orthodontics, cosmetic) indicates higher-value operations.

urgency_trigger_signals.rationale: No hiring posts or expansion announcements found. Mild urgency from outdated website design suggesting deferred tech investment.

rationale: Strong ICP fit with clear pain signals from website analysis. Reachability is moderate — office manager contact available but practice owner not directly reachable. Good personalization potential from rich website content.
